American Made (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $51,342,000Details
International Box Office $84,227,212
Worldwide Box Office $135,569,212
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,374,557
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,562,812
Total $8,937,369
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Barry Seal, a TWA pilot, is recruited by the CIA to provide reconnaissance on the burgeoning communist threat in Central America and soon finds himself in charge of one of the biggest covert CIA operations in the history of the United States, one that spawned the birth of the Medellin cartel and eventually almost brought down the Reagan White House with the Iran Contra scandal.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,776,390 (32.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.06 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:37.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,024 opening theaters/3,098 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $68,456,002

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 29th, 2017 (Wide) by Universal
September 29th, 2017 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: August 23rd, 2017 (Wide) (Egypt)
August 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Macedonia)
August 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Slovenia)
August 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Israel)
August 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Denmark)
Video Release: December 19th, 2017 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language throughout and some sexuality/nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2481 (Cert #51109), 6/21/2017)
Running Time: 114 minutes
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: C.I.A., Drug Trafficking, Narcotics, Smuggler
Social setting: Crime Caper, In a Plane
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Time period setting: 1980s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Cross Creek Pictures, Imagine Entertainment, Quadrant Pictures, Vendian Entertainment, Hercules Film Fund, Universal Pictures, Brian Grazer Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Barry Seal, a TWA pilot, is recruited by the CIA to provide reconnaissance on the burgeoning communist threat in Central America and soon finds himself in charge of one of the biggest covert CIA operations in the history of the United States, one that spawned the birth of the Medellin cartel and eventually almost brought down the Reagan White House with the Iran Contra scandal.
